compiled_state.title: Add three mechanism fields to planning-intelligence log
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Modify `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` planning-intelligence log format (lines 416-423). Add three new fields after the existing "Practitioner-requested additional cycles" entry:

```
- **Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0)**: [not triggered | triggered — depth: <follow_on_scrutiny_depth>]
- **Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5)**: [not triggered | triggered — cycles: <feasibility_cycle_count>, gap: <triggering gap description>]
- **LLM-instruction signal (Step 5)**: [not triggered | triggered — keyword: <matched_keyword>]
```

Each field consumes the named state variable exposed by the corresponding story:
- follow_on_scrutiny_depth (from story c670-00ff)
- feasibility_cycle_count (from story 40ba-2c9f)
- matched_keyword (from story c2bc-6f44)

Also remove RED marker from .test-index after tests pass.

**TDD**: Task abd1-8209 RED tests turn GREEN after this implementation.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (EDIT — planning-intelligence log section)
- .test-index (EDIT — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All 3 log extension tests pass (GREEN state)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-planning-intelligence-log-extensions.sh
- [ ] Existing brainstorm approval gate tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] Log contains follow-on scrutiny field
  Verify: sed -n '/Planning Intelligence Log/,/^---/p' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -qi "follow.on scrutiny"
- [ ] Log contains feasibility resolution field
  Verify: sed -n '/Planning Intelligence Log/,/^---/p' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -qi "feasibility resolution"
- [ ] Log contains LLM-instruction signal field
  Verify: sed -n '/Planning Intelligence Log/,/^---/p' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -qi "LLM.instruction signal"
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_log_' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: read_first gate — read SKILL.md log section (lines 416-423) and test file. Tests check for follow_on_scrutiny_depth, feasibility_cycle_count, and matched_keyword in the log section.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests confirmed — all 3 tests fail as expected. Proceeding to implement.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete — added 3 fields to SKILL.md log section, removed RED marker from .test-index.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: All ACs verified — 3 log extension tests GREEN, brainstorm approval gate 13/13 pass, follow-on scrutiny 10/10 pass, feasibility resolution 6/6 pass. All grep verifications for follow-on scrutiny, feasibility resolution, LLM-instruction signal fields confirmed. RED marker removed from .test-index.
